title: Foreman's Rod
subtitle: Point at the world from a menu

tutorial.title: Foreman's Rod Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Mark work storage without losing your place

objectives.label: Mark a worker drop-off
substeps: Choose the drop-off or storage action.
Right-click a valid storage block inside the settlement.
The worker menu reopens so you can keep configuring the same citizen.

objectives.label: Mark a tool storage
substeps: Open the Town Hall Labor tab.
Choose a worker role or preferred storage action.
Right-click the storage block that should provide tools.
Workers of that type can now pull required tools from storage.

objectives.label: Set preferred storage
substeps: Open the Town Hall Labor tab.
Use Preferred Storage for a broad default.
The settlement applies that storage to worker needs where possible.

pages.text: Craft a Foreman's Rod on a Crafting Stone with &6one stick&r and &6one plant fiber&r. It is the mod's bridge between UI decisions and physical places. When a screen asks you to mark a storage, field, pen, or work site, the next right-click in the world is the answer.

pages.caption: Crafting Stone: one stick and one plant fiber

pages.text: Pinned tutorials for jobs and crises often include Foreman's Rod substeps because a worker is not really ready until their tool, source, and drop-off requirements are satisfied.
